# environment

**Instance Property**

The version of the app’s container. Possible values are [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit].[doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit/DEVELOPMENT_ENVIRONMENT] and [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit].[doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit/PRODUCTION_ENVIRONMENT].

## Declaration

```swift
attribute String environment;
```
title: environment
